name: openclaw-antigravity-mcp
description: Bridge your Antigravity Claude Proxy to any MCP client. Free Claude Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, and Gemini 3 access through 5 MCP tools. Zero dependencies.

tools.name: chat
tools.description: Chat with Claude or Gemini models. Multi-turn, system prompts, temperature control.

tools.name: code
tools.description: Generate, review, debug, refactor, explain, or test code.

tools.name: models
tools.description: List all available models on your proxy.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Check proxy health and account info.
